description: CompositionBlack denim shorts made of 2% spandex, 66% cotton and 32% polyester, with a front zippered and buttoned waist, belt loops, two front pockets with a small pocket near the right pocket and two back pockets with embroideryFittingRegularWash care Machine or hand wash separately Use mild detergent only Do not bleach or wring Use mild detergent only Dry in shade Medium iron Gear up and hit the road in style in these comfortable denim shorts from jealous 21. With a buttoned and zippered front, the shorts sit snugly around your waist, while the loops help you either customise the Fit with a belt, or simply sport a stylish one to create your personal fashion statement. Team this with stylish tops and lifetsyle footwear for that cool, casual look.Model's statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-25"
